# `education` — education templates

**Industry:** Higher Education  ·  **Templates:** 2

Phishing templates targeting students and educational institution staff

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Financial Aid Urgent Notice | [`financial_aid_urgent.html`](financial_aid_urgent.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 50-70% |
| Student Portal Account Lockout | [`student_portal_lockout.html`](student_portal_lockout.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 45-65% |

## Template details

### Financial Aid Urgent Notice

- **File:** [`financial_aid_urgent.html`](financial_aid_urgent.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 50-70%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/education_phishing_education.html`](education/education_phishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - URGENT: Your financial aid requires immediate action
  - Financial Aid Office: Your award is at risk — respond now
  - Action Required: FAFSA verification needed before deadline
- **Operator notes:** Extremely effective for student populations. Financial aid anxiety is a powerful motivator.

### Student Portal Account Lockout

- **File:** [`student_portal_lockout.html`](student_portal_lockout.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 45-65%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/education_phishing_education.html`](education/education_phishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Your student account has been temporarily suspended
  - Action Required: Verify your student portal account
  - Account hold detected — resolve before registration opens

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
